title: microloma lanatum
intro: Microloma lanatum, also known as the hairy bindweed, is a perennial vine plant native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Microloma lanatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
